name: native-gift-with-purchase
author: iminiscript (https://github.com/iminiscript)
description: Native (no-app) gift-with-purchase / free-gift builder for Shopify Online Store 2.0 (theme-blocks) themes such as Horizon — REQUIRES an OS 2.0 sections + theme-blocks architecture; NOT for vintage/legacy themes. Automatically adds ONE configured free gift product to the cart when a single spend threshold is met, shows a progress bar ('spend $X more for your free gift') in the cart drawer/page plus an optional PDP message, keeps the gift quantity at 1, and removes it when the cart drops below the threshold. Strictly one gift and one threshold — NO tiers, NO tiered discounts. The gift line is marked with the `_isGWP` line-item property; add/remove happen via /cart/add.js and /cart/change.js guarded by a lock + state-memoization so the reconcile never infinite-loops. The gift is made FREE by the MERCHANT — either a $0 product/variant or a Shopify automatic 'free gift' discount — NOT by theme price manipulation; the theme adds the line and computes the threshold on the NON-gift subtotal. Everything (the gift product, the single threshold, messages, and full progress-bar styling) is theme-customizer configurable, with a master on/off toggle. Use when a task involves a gift with purchase, free gift, GWP, a GWP / cart progress bar, spend-goal bar, 'spend $X for a free gift', or 'create a progress bar for the cart' — the plugin supplies all settings and behavior from a minimal prompt. NATIVE THEME BUILD ONLY, SINGLE GIFT + SINGLE THRESHOLD — NOT multi-tier thresholds or tiered discounts, NOT a third-party gift/upsell/rewards app (Rebuy, etc.), NOT authoring the automatic discount itself, NOT a loyalty program, NOT the build-your-own-bundle builder (use native-bundle-builder). Never edits volatile template JSON — ships stable Liquid/JS/CSS.
